summary: Testing iteration 27: Verified landing page, driver login flow, driver app onboarding, partner portal, and backend APIs. All requested features are working correctly. Backend APIs return 200 status. Frontend loads and navigation flows work.

minor.issue: Fields return None instead of configured values in some cases - may be state-dependent

issues: Two-step onboarding (plan selection + car selection) works but may confuse new users

critical_code_review_comments: Landing page at / loads correctly with SnapRoad branding, 'Safe journeys, smart rewards' headline
Driver login flow works: click Log In -> enter credentials -> navigate to /driver
/driver shows onboarding flow: Plan Selection -> Car Selection -> Color Selection -> Main dashboard
Partner portal at /portal/partner loads without authentication and shows welcome tour
/app/driver shows the new Figma UI with 'Get Started' and 'I already have an account' options
Backend APIs all functional: health, auth/login, trips/history/detailed, offers, leaderboard, badges

success_rate.backend: 100% - All critical endpoints working (health, auth, trips, offers)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Landing page, driver login, onboarding, partner portal all functional

seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data for users, trips, offers, badges. Data resets on server restart.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working. Landing page loads at /. Driver login works with driver@snaproad.com/password123. Driver app at /driver has 3-step onboarding (plan->car->color). Partner portal at /portal/partner loads without auth. /app/driver shows new Figma UI design. Mobile app in /app/snaproad-mobile cannot be browser-tested.

elements: Feature icons (Safety Score, Earn Gems, Leaderboards, Premium Perks)
Navigation tabs: Map, Routes, Rewards, Profile

steps: Click Log In on landing page
Auth modal opens with 'Welcome back, Driver'

elements: Welcome to Partner Portal tour modal
Dashboard, My Offers, Analytics, Accounts, Boosts sidebar items
I already have an account button
Partner Portal and Admin Portal links

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory storage. Trip data, offers, user data all mocked. No real database connected.
